rejection_reasons: Only the reviewed exact domains apply; remaining neurology referral documentation content lacks exact support.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.

population_applicability: People with relevant neurology referral documentation history, findings and clinician decisions entered.
setting_applicability: Partial for specified adult neurological presentations; not a universal referral standard.
UAE_applicability: NICE requires UAE referral criteria, urgency, service, authorization and communication adaptation.
recency_verification: The cited current official documents and exact sections were opened and reviewed on 2026-07-17.
superseded_check: The selected official pages remained current; no newer replacement was identified during the targeted review.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports selected adult dizziness and vertigo referral features for neurology referral documentation; no decision is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports focal neurological and hearing red flags, acute vestibular syndrome, HINTS by trained clinicians, neuroimaging referral, and Hallpike assessment for positional vertigo.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports selected adult weakness referral features for neurology referral documentation; no decision is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports sudden, progressive, fluctuating, unilateral, symmetrical, sensory-associated, and back-pain-associated weakness, urgent referral, and clinician-led imaging where specified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports selected adult sensory referral features for neurology referral documentation; no decision is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports sudden unilateral numbness, rapidly progressive symmetrical sensory change with weakness or imbalance, recurrent sensory episodes, distal sensory distribution, reflex and gait context, selected metabolic tests, radicular symptoms, bowel or bladder context, and clinician-led referral.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Supports selected adult tremor referral features for neurology referral documentation; no decision is generated.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports rest or asymmetric tremor, stiffness, slowness, balance or gait difficulty, symmetrical postural tremor, medicine, thyroid and alcohol review, functional impact, head tremor, and clinician-led referral.

unresolved_source_gaps: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
